sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Amt1 = 0 or Amt2 = 0 or Amt3 = 0 or Amt4 = 0)

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, Crcy,CC,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, Amt4,PK) (Select KeyID, GL, Crcy, CC, round(sum(coalesce(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1, round(sum(coalesce(Amt2,0)),2) as Amt2,  round(sum(coalesce(Amt3,0)),2) as Amt3,round(sum(coalesce(Amt4,0)),2) as Amt4, '' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, GL, Crcy,CC)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL
insert into TransX (KeyID,GL,Crcy,Co,CC,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4) (select KeyID + '-data2',GL,Crcy,'2006' as Co,CC,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')

insert into TransX (KeyID,GL,Crcy,Co,CC,Contract,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4) (select KeyID,GL,Crcy,'2006' as Co,'1CBA000009' as CC,'1CBA000008' as Contract,-Amt1,-Amt2,-Amt3,-Amt4 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co is NULL)

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, Crcy,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, Amt4,Co,PC,TP) (Select KeyID, '1999901' as GL, Crcy, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2,  round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3,round(sum(Amt4),2) as Amt4, '2006' as Co,'1600000000' as PC, '3060' as TP from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co is NULL group by KeyID, Crcy)
insert into TransX (KeyID,GL,Crcy,Co,CC,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3) (select KeyID,GL,Crcy,'3060' as Co,'3NBS100001' as CC,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co is NULL)

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, Crcy,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,Co,PC,TP) (Select KeyID, '2899901' as GL, Crcy, round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2,  round(-sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, Co,'3990000000' as PC, '2006' as TP from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '3060' group by KeyID,Co, Crcy)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co = '2008' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, CC, Contract, TP, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, Amt4,PK) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, CC, Contract, TP, (case when Amt1 > 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, (case when Amt2 > 0 then Amt2 else 0 end) as Amt2, (case when Amt3 > 0 then Amt3 else 0 end) as Amt3, (case when Amt4 > 0 then Amt4 else 0 end) as Amt4, '40' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL and Co = '2006')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, CC, Contract, TP,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, Amt4,PK) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, CC, Contract, TP, (case when Amt1 < 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, (case when Amt2 < 0 then Amt2 else 0 end) as Amt2, (case when Amt3 < 0 then Amt3 else 0 end) as Amt3, (case when Amt4 < 0 then Amt4 else 0 end) as Amt4, '50' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL and Co = '2006')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, CC, Contract, TP, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,PK) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, CC, Contract, TP, (case when Amt1 > 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, (case when Amt2 > 0 then Amt2 else 0 end) as Amt2, (case when Amt3 > 0 then Amt3 else 0 end) as Amt3, '40' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL and Co = '3060')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, CC, Contract, TP,Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,PK) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, CC, Contract, TP, (case when Amt1 < 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, (case when Amt2 < 0 then Amt2 else 0 end) as Amt2, (case when Amt3 < 0 then Amt3 else 0 end) as Amt3, '50' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL and Co = '3060')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0
update a set GL = b.Field1 from TransX a inner join Misc_Tables b on a.GL = b.Descr and b.Table_ID = 'NL-CA_Chgback' and b.ID = 'GL' where a.keyID = '[batchID]' and a.Co = '3060'
update x set x.GLdesc = y.Descr from TransX x inner join COA y on x.GL = y.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
update TransX set Txt = 'NL-CA Chgback for [Yr]/[Mo]' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set ProdCode = 'CHGBACK' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '6%'
